title: Hammerite Spray Paint for Metal. Direct to Rust Exterior Black Metal Paint, Smooth Finish. Corrosion Resistant Black Gloss Paint and Rust Remover, 8 Year Protection - 400ml Aerosol 0.5 SqM Coverage​
features: SPRAY DIRECTLY ON TO RUST – unique alkyd-technology formula that acts as a rust converter, so you can spray paint over rusty metal and still achieve a perfect finish that looks smart and fresh, lasts for years and helps prevent rust and corrosion forming​

EASY TO USE – preparation is simple – just brush away any loose, flaky paint or rust and spray 3-4 coats of black metal paint straight on to the metal, leaving 15 minutes between coats. No sanding, no undercoat or primer and no topcoat are needed​

USE ON ANY METAL – perfect for gates, railings, garden furniture and garage doors, Hammerite spray paint for metal works on ferrous and non-ferrous metals giving a smooth, gloss finish that transforms any metal and gives your home an instant lift​

400ml AEROSOL COVERS UP TO 0.5m2 – ideal to cover an ornate table, or for touching up cast iron guttering and drainpipes, Hammerite direct to metal paint gives excellent coverage of difficult shapes without running or sagging and dries in just 2 hours​

GENUINE HAMMERITE PAINT - the first and only specialist metalcare brand, Hammerite is a global brand leader. Founded in 1984 it quickly developed a mystique, as consumers found the unique formulation magically transforms rusty metal to look like new​
Hammerite smooth black direct to rust metal paint
Performs as a primer, undercoat and topcoat in one
description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Direct to Rust Exterior Gloss Spray Paint, Black Flawless, long-lasting, smooth gloss finish Keeping its sheen through all seasons, Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint is a durable, decorative coating for ferrous and non-ferrous metals that provides up to 8 years of protection against rust, corrosion and UV damage. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a unique 3-in-1 formula that needs no primer, undercoat or topcoat. It's so easy to restore, decorate and protect your metals and get a perfect finish every time. HOW TO USE Remove all loose rust and flaking paint with a wire brush Wash and rinse with clean water and allow to dry Shake can vigorously and spray directly onto metal from 15cm distance For best results, apply 3-4 coats of Hammerite Leave to dry for 15 minutes between coats DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Direct to Rust instantly provides the ultimate protection for your metals with no need for lengthy pre-treatment. ALKYD TECHNOLOGY Unique alykd technology forms a touch barrier for long-lasting metal protection from water, frost, sunlight and rust. 3-IN-1 PAINT Undercoat, primer and topcoat in one. Apply directly to rusty metals to quickly and effectively transform your home and garden with the perfect finish – first time, every time.
